ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "voice_mail_extension" TEXT /* Voice mail extension of the teacher */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the teacher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the teacher (e.g., Professor, Assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_hours" (
  "office_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office hour */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the office hour */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the office hour */,
  "room_location" TEXT /* Room location of the office hour */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the office hour */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the office hour (e.g., Available, Booked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_hours_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "room_location" TEXT /* Room location of the meeting */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the meeting */,
  "meeting_status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., In-person, Online) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's parent (for minors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., teacher, administrator, student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting request */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the request */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher being requested */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the requested meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the requested meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the requested meeting */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_requests_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_requests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting request being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the meeting request (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., Accepted, Declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES meeting_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting or event being reminded */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., Sent, Not Sent) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reminder was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting request being notified */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting response being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Request, Response, Reminder) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES meeting_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES meeting_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher being reported */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being reported */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "meeting_count" INTEGER /* Number of meetings between the teacher and student */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Teacher Workload, Student Meeting Frequency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)
